message:
fix(session-context): add validation to removeAlternativeHypothesis

Prevent invalid state by validating before archiving:
- Check if hypothesis ID exists in hypothesisCards
- Check if ID is in alternativeHypothesisIds (not already archived)

This prevents:
- Duplicate IDs in archivedHypothesisIds from multiple calls
- Non-existent hypothesis IDs being added to archivedHypothesisIds
